ddls:
CREATE TABLE "marathon_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the record */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the athlete */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the athlete */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the record was set */,
  "event" TEXT /* Event or location where the record was set */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the record (e.g., ARRS, IAAF) */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status of the record (e.g., verified, disputed, pending) */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was last verified */,
  "verified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who verified the record */,
  "event_distance" TEXT /* Distance of the event (e.g., 42.195 km) */,
  "elevation_gain" TEXT /* Total elevation gain during the event */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the event */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marathon_records_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marathon_records_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marathon_records_verified_by FOREIGN KEY ("verified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marathon_records_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the athlete */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the athlete */,
  "country_of_birth" TEXT /* Country of birth of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the athlete */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the athlete */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the athlete */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the athlete's coach */,
  "sponsors" TEXT /* Sponsors of the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., marathon, half-marathon) */,
  "course_map" TEXT /* URL to a map of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the event organizer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the source's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the source was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record the note belongs to */,
  "note" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was added */,
  "note_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., disputed, verified, miscellaneous) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_note_by FOREIGN KEY ("note_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES marathon_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the user account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "record_types" (
  "record_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record type */,
  "record_type" TEXT /* Name of the record type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the record type */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code to visually distinguish record types */,
  "icon" TEXT /* URL to an icon representing the record type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "record_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being classified */,
  "record_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record type */,
  "classification_date" TEXT /* Date when the classification was made */,
  "classified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who classified the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_record_classifications_classified_by FOREIGN KEY ("classified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_record_classifications_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES marathon_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_record_classifications_record_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_type_id") REFERENCES record_types ("record_type_id")
)
